core.name: Captain Rowan
core.backstory: Captain Rowan is the town guard captain of Oakmere, usually found at North Gate watchhouse. Known as disciplined, weary, protective, Captain Rowan has become tangled in the town's quiet conflict around Lord Vane's schemes. Privately, Captain Rowan carries a dangerous secret: Keeps a hidden ledger of Vane's unlawful orders.

relationships.Lord Vane: serves him by law but suspects corruption
relationships.Nyx: uses her rumors while pretending not to
relationships.Talia: trusts her reports about suspicious travelers

dynamic.current_goal: Continue daily work as town guard captain while protecting this secret: Keeps a hidden ledger of Vane's unlawful orders
